name: CFSC Checks Cashed Rockaway Beach Queens
description_short: CFSC is a check-cashing and financial services provider in Rockaway Park, Queens, offering instant check cashing without a bank account, plus money transfers, bill pay, and prepaid cards.
description_long:
CFSC (Community Financial Services) operates a financial services location at 114-17 Rockaway Beach Boulevard in Rockaway Park, Queens, serving the local community with non-bank financial solutions. The company specializes in check cashing for individuals and businesses, allowing customers to cash checks immediately without a bank account or waiting for funds to clear. Beyond check cashing, CFSC provides a comprehensive suite of money management services designed for unbanked and underbanked consumers who need quick access to financial tools and services.

The Rockaway Park location offers check cashing (personal and business), money orders, electronic bill payment, domestic and international money transfers, ATM access, prepaid debit cards (Yes! Debit Account), foreign currency exchange, prepaid cellular phone services, tax refund check cashing, Transit/MetroCard purchases, EZ Pass services, and lottery ticket sales. The company operates extended hours Monday through Friday (9:00 AM–7:30 PM), Saturday (9:00 AM–5:30 PM), and Sunday (9:15 AM–4:30 PM), making services accessible beyond typical bank hours. They accept multiple government-issued photo IDs and conduct identity verification before cashing checks.

What distinguishes CFSC is the breadth of ancillary services bundled with check cashing, including foreign currency exchange (80+ countries), phone buyback through EcoATM kiosks, and partnerships with major money transfer networks like Western Union. The company emphasizes bilingual service (Se Habla Español) and operates without requiring credit checks for prepaid debit card accounts. Their extended weekend and evening hours cater to working-class populations and those unable to visit traditional banks during standard business hours.

The primary limitation is that CFSC is a check-cashing intermediary, not a regulated bank, meaning fees apply to most transactions and there is no deposit insurance on funds. While convenient for immediate cash access, the cost of check cashing and money transfers may exceed bank alternatives for frequent users. The company's reliance on photo ID verification and SSN collection, while standard industry practice, requires personal documentation. Services vary by location, and customers should verify availability before visiting.
address: 114-17 Rockaway Beach Blvd, Rockaway Park, NY 11694

company_info.headquarters: 114-17 Rockaway Beach Blvd, Rockaway Park, NY 11694

pros: No bank account required to cash checks — immediate access to funds without waiting for clearance
Extended hours including evenings (until 7:30 PM weekdays) and weekend service (open Sundays 9:15 AM–4:30 PM)
Multiple government-issued photo ID types accepted (Driver's License, Passport, State ID, Student ID, Work ID)
Business check cashing available on-site for commercial customers
Foreign currency exchange for 80+ countries at one location
No credit check required for Yes! Debit Card prepaid account
Partnerships with Western Union for international money transfers and multiple service brands (Boost, EcoATM, CoinFlip)
cons: Check cashing and money transfer services incur fees that typically exceed traditional bank rates
No deposit insurance or FDIC protection — funds held are not federally insured
Personal data collection requirement (SSN, address, contact information) for check cashing creates privacy exposure
Services vary by location; customers must call ahead to confirm specific offerings
Prepaid debit cards require ongoing purchases/reloading, with potential inactivity or monthly maintenance fees (not detailed on site)
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals who need immediate check cashing without a bank account
Gig workers and self-employed people who cash business checks frequently
International money senders needing reliable wire transfer and currency exchange services
Customers needing financial services outside standard banking hours (evenings and weekends)
diagnosis: CFSC Rockaway Beach is best for unbanked consumers, gig workers, and immigrants who need immediate check cashing and money transfer services outside traditional banking hours without a bank account or credit check. The primary caveat is that convenience comes at a cost—check cashing and transfer fees will exceed bank alternatives, and funds lack FDIC protection.
services: Personal check cashing (no bank account required)
Domestic and international money transfers (Western Union)
